toolbox.description: Interactive MATLAB/Simulink/Simscape GUI for simulating the Hybrid Van der Pol-Duffing nonlinear oscillator with Simscape RC ladder fractional-order sub-networks. Supports Simulink-only analysis, Arduino Due hardware-in-the-loop streaming, phase portraits, Poincare sections, spectrograms, and high-resolution export.

author.name: Sujay Kumar Dolai and Somnath Roy

optionalAddOns.optionalAddOn: Simulink Support Package for Arduino Hardware
